---
title: "  Elizabeth Palgrave"
---

##   Elizabeth Palgrave

**Dates:** (1799–1852)

**Maiden name:** (Turner), Lady

### Description

wife of Sir Francis Palgrave

### Letters

- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
